category_sources: source_facts.description says it submits tracks to audioscrobbler; official homepage describes mpdas as a C++ client submitting tracks to AudioScrobbler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mpdas; official homepage URL and description use mpdas.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official mpdas page and best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage/source archive do not identify an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe an MPD AudioScrobbler submission client.
